seo.title: 5 Money Lessons from 40 Financial Experts
seo.description: What 40 Podcasts Taught Me About Investing Over the last year, I recorded 40+ podcasts with CEOs, Fund Managers, Financial Coaches, Journalists and

takeaways: After more than 40 conversations with CEOs, fund managers, coaches, journalists and authors, one pattern kept surfacing: most of us are asking the wrong questions about money.
"Which stock should I buy?" is the wrong place to start, and this episode explains why that question quietly leads investors astray.
You really only need to understand 7 asset classes, not chase every new product that lands in your feed.
Even the best fund managers cannot predict the market, which is exactly why diversification matters when no one knows what comes next.
One habit is what separates smart investors from everyone else, and it has little to do with picking the perfect stock.
